title: stelis piestopus
intro: Stelis piestopus, also known as the 'Yellow Lip Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its unique yellow lip and fragrant flowers. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Stelis piestopus are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis piestopus are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being, and may be consumed as teas, infusions, or extracts.
